name: Lisas Breakfast
recipeIngredient: 4 medium potatoes, cubed into 1/2 inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onions and garlic with a splash of water until the onions become translucent.
2. Add the cubed potatoes and 1/4 cup water to the skillet. Stir in the green and red peppers, mushrooms, and cook over medium flame for about 15 minutes or until the potatoes begin to soften.
3. Add the chopped tomatoes and black pepper (if using hot sauce). Continue cooking until the potatoes reach your desired level of firmness.
4. This dish is excellent with your favorite salsa added in. It also pairs well with fat-free sour cream if desired.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers, please ensure you cook this dish on a medium flame and avoid overcooking the vegetables to maintain their quality.
